MaxLineLength:ParkingUtils.kt$ParkingUtils$val cal = Calendar.getInstance().apply { time = sdf.parse(date) ?: return date; add(Calendar.DAY_OF_YEAR, days) }

MaxLineLength:Profile.kt$Text(langName, fontWeight = if (lang.code == currentLanguageCode) FontWeight.Bold else FontWeight.Normal)
MaxLineLength:Profile.kt$Text(text = vehicle.licensePlate, fontSize = 18.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface)

MaxLineLength:ViewParking.kt$Text(label, fontSize = 11.sp, fontWeight = if (selected) FontWeight.Bold else FontWeight.Normal, color = if (selected) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface)

MaxLineLength:ViewParking.kt$Text(stringResource(R.string.reservations_count_label, spotReservations.size), fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 16.dp), color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface)

MaxLineLength:ViewParking.kt$Text(stringResource(R.string.schedule_format, reservation.startTime, reservation.endTime), fontSize = 13.sp, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary, modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 4.dp))

MaxLineLength:ViewParking.kt$ViewParkingFilterChip(selected = selectedType == SpotType.DISABLED, onClick = { onTypeSelected(SpotType.DISABLED) }, label = stringResource(R.string.spot_type_disabled), icon = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Accessible)

MaxLineLength:ViewParking.kt$ViewParkingFilterChip(selected = selectedType == SpotType.ELECTRIC, onClick = { onTypeSelected(SpotType.ELECTRIC) }, label = stringResource(R.string.spot_type_electric), icon = Icons.Default.ElectricCar)

MaxLineLength:ViewParking.kt$ViewParkingFilterChip(selected = selectedType == SpotType.MOTORCYCLE, onClick = { onTypeSelected(SpotType.MOTORCYCLE) }, label = stringResource(R.string.spot_type_motorcycle), icon = Icons.Default.TwoWheeler)

MaxLineLength:ViewParking.kt$ViewParkingFilterChip(selected = selectedType == SpotType.NORMAL, onClick = { onTypeSelected(SpotType.NORMAL) }, label = stringResource(R.string.spot_type_normal), icon = Icons.Default.DirectionsCar)
MaxLineLength:ViewParking.kt$ViewParkingFilterChip(selected = selectedType == null, onClick = { onTypeSelected(null) }, label = stringResource(R.string.filter_all), icon = Icons.Default.LocalParking)
MaxLineLength:ViewParking.kt$ViewParkingFilterChips(selectedType = spotTypeFilter, onTypeSelected = { spotTypeFilter = it; selectedSpot = null })

MaxLineLength:ViewParking.kt$ViewSpotGrid(selectedSpot = selectedSpot, onSpotSelected = { selectedSpot = it }, occupiedSpots = occupiedSpots, userSpots = userSpots, spotTypeFilter = spotTypeFilter)
